title: plectranthus lanuginosus
intro: Plectranthus lanuginosus, also known as woolly false sage or woolly leafed mountain balm, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Plectranthus lanuginosus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
